case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. HECTOR CINTRON

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: KATAYAMA, ERIN SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR CINTRON, HECTOR
